title: Hazel Quinn x Eduardo Recife 2-Slice Toaster, 6 Browning Levels, Defrost/Reheat/Cancel Functions, Removable Crumb Tray for Easy Cleaning, 1.5-Inch Extra-Wide Slots, Retro Style Collaboration
features: 3 Functions: Hazel Quinn 2-slice retro toaster lets you conveniently toast either one or two slices of bread at a time. Moreover, with the 3 practical easy-to-use functions, you can choose to Cancel, Defrost, and Reheat your toast.

6 Browning Settings Adjustable: This retro toaster features 6 browning settings. Set the desired toasting temperature by adjusting the control knob, to give you just the right amount of toasting crispness to satisfy your preference.

Bread Auto-center Function: Hazel Quinn retro toaster with the self-centering feature, both sides of the bread will be baked simultaneously and evenly, making sure that they have the same great taste every time.

Removable Crumb Tray: Hazel Quinn 2-slice toaster is designed with a removable and washable crumb tray. It is located at the entire bottom of the toaster and can collect the crumbs without messing up the countertop, making the cleaning easier and quicker.

Dimensions: Each bread slot size is 1.5'' wide x 5.3'' long x 4.7'' high. Suitable for bread no larger 1.4’’ thickness x 5.1’’ length x 4.5’’ height. It allows you to fit toast, bagels, muffins, and plenty more of your favorites.
description: Product Description 1.5 Inches Extra Wide Slots Enjoy versatile toasting with this 2-slice toaster, offering 1.5-inch extra-wide slots that fit your thickest slices, up to 1.4 inches in thickness and 5.1 inches in length. Toast your favorites with ease! Removable Crumb Tray Hazel Quinn's 2-slice toaster features a convenient, removable crumb tray at the bottom for effortless crumb collection, making cleaning quick and easy. Lift-and-look Lever The lever-operated system enables you to monitor the progress without disrupting the cooking or warming process, making it easier than ever to achieve your desired results. Hidden Power Cord The hidden power cord makes it easy to use and store, giving you a clean and organized kitchen, say goodbye to cluttered countertops.
